title: phragmites communis subsp. chrysanthus
intro: Phragmites communis subsp. chrysanthus, also known as Golden Feather Reed Grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phragmites communis subsp. chrysanthus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
